# clickfolio.me — Full Documentation

Turn your PDF resume into a hosted web portfolio website in seconds. Upload your resume, and AI parses it into a professional website with a custom @handle URL — free forever.

## Product Overview

clickfolio.me is an AI-powered resume-to-website platform. Users upload a PDF resume, and within ~30 seconds the system extracts work experience, education, skills, projects, and contact information using advanced language models. The result is a live, shareable portfolio website at `clickfolio.me/@handle`.

The platform is free for all base features with no time limits. Premium templates are unlockable through a referral system. There is no paywall — the business model relies on viral growth through portfolio sharing.

### Key Differentiators

- **No signup to upload**: Users drop their PDF first, authenticate later
- **Instant publishing**: ~30 seconds from upload to live portfolio
- **10 professionally designed templates**: 6 free, 4 referral-gated
- **Full editing suite**: Inline content editing with auto-save
- **Privacy controls**: Per-field visibility toggles (phone, address, search indexing)
- **Custom @handle URLs**: Permanent, memorable URLs
- **Open source**: MIT licensed, source available on GitHub
- **AI accuracy**: 95%+ parsing accuracy across 10,000+ resumes

## All 10 Templates

### Free Templates (0 referrals required)

1. **Minimalist Editorial** (default) — Clean magazine-style layout with serif typography. Professional and timeless.
   - Category: Professional

2. **Neo Brutalist** — Bold design with thick borders and loud colors. High contrast, distinctive personality.
   - Category: Creative

3. **Glass Morphic** — Dark theme with frosted glass effects. Modern and sleek.
   - Category: Modern

4. **Bento Grid** — Modern mosaic layout with colorful cards. Organizes content into visually distinct blocks.
   - Category: Modern

5. **Classic ATS** — Legal brief typography with single-column ATS-optimized layout. Ideal for job applications.
   - Category: Professional

6. **DevTerminal** — GitHub-inspired dark terminal aesthetic for developers. Monospace typography, console-style presentation.
   - Category: Developer

### Premium Templates (referral-gated)

7. **DesignFolio** (3 referrals) — Digital brutalism meets Swiss typography. Dark theme with acid lime accents.
   - Category: Creative

8. **Spotlight** (3 referrals) — Warm creative portfolio with animated sections. Engaging, dynamic presentation.
   - Category: Creative

9. **Midnight** (5 referrals) — Dark minimal with serif headings and gold accents. Elegant and sophisticated.
   - Category: Modern

10. **Bold Corporate** (10 referrals) — Executive typography with bold numbered sections. Premium professional look.
    - Category: Professional

## FAQ

### What is clickfolio.me?

clickfolio.me turns your PDF resume into a hosted web portfolio in seconds. Upload your resume, and our AI parses it into a professional website with a custom @handle URL — free forever.

### How does the AI resume parsing work?

We use advanced language models to extract your work experience, education, skills, projects, and contact info from your PDF resume. The parsing takes about 30 seconds and produces a complete, editable online portfolio.

### Is clickfolio.me really free?

Yes. All 6 base templates are completely free with no time limits. You can upgrade to 4 premium templates by sharing your portfolio with others via our referral system.

### Can I customize my portfolio after publishing?

Absolutely. You get a full editing suite to update your content anytime. Changes auto-save and publish instantly. You can also switch between 10 templates, control what's visible via privacy settings, and update your @handle.

## All Public URLs

### Core Pages
- Homepage: https://clickfolio.me
- Browse Portfolios: https://clickfolio.me/explore
- Privacy Policy: https://clickfolio.me/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://clickfolio.me/terms

### Profession Landing Pages
- Software Engineers: https://clickfolio.me/for/software-engineer
- Designers: https://clickfolio.me/for/designer
- Marketers: https://clickfolio.me/for/marketer
- Students: https://clickfolio.me/for/student
- Consultants: https://clickfolio.me/for/consultant
- Product Managers: https://clickfolio.me/for/product-manager

### Dynamic Pages
- Portfolio URLs: https://clickfolio.me/@{handle}
- OG Images: https://clickfolio.me/api/og/{handle}

### Static Resources
- robots.txt: https://clickfolio.me/robots.txt
- sitemap.xml: https://clickfolio.me/sitemap.xml
- Sitemap Index: https://clickfolio.me/api/sitemap-index

## Tech Stack

### Platform
- **Runtime**: Cloudflare Workers (edge compute)
- **Framework**: vinext (Vite-based Next.js on Workers)
- **Language**: TypeScript

### Storage
- **Database**: Cloudflare D1 (SQLite-compatible, distributed)
- **File Storage**: Cloudflare R2 (S3-compatible object storage)

### AI & Parsing
- **AI Provider**: OpenAI via OpenRouter, proxied through Cloudflare AI Gateway
- **PDF Extraction**: unpdf (embedded in Worker bundle)
- **AI SDK**: Vercel AI SDK for structured output parsing

### Authentication
- **Auth Provider**: Better Auth (Google OAuth + email/password)
- **Session Management**: Database-backed sessions with cookie transport

### Real-time
- **WebSocket**: Cloudflare Durable Objects for live parsing status updates

### Infrastructure
- **Queue**: Cloudflare Queues for async resume parsing
- **Cron**: Cloudflare Workers Cron Triggers for scheduled cleanup
- **Email**: Cloudflare Email Service binding

### Tooling
- **ORM**: Drizzle ORM
- **Validation**: Zod
- **Testing**: Vitest
- **Linting/Formatting**: Biome
- **Package Manager**: Bun

## Privacy & Security

- All user data stored in D1 (SQLite) and R2 (object storage)
- Authentication via Better Auth with Google OAuth and email/password
- Session tokens stored in HTTP-only cookies
- Privacy controls allow users to selectively hide phone numbers, full addresses, and opt out of search engine indexing
- R2 file storage uses signed URLs for uploads
- IP-based rate limiting on file uploads
- Source code is open source (MIT) — security through transparency

## Contact

- Support: support@clickfolio.me
- Source Code: https://github.com/divkix/clickfolio.me
